mapper.select: /* AdminBbsMapper.selectBbsDetail */ SELECT BBS_SEQ AS bbsSeq ,BBS_NM AS bbsNm ,BBS_TYPE AS bbsType ,FIXING_YN AS fixingYn ,REPLY_YN AS replyYn ,FILE_ATCH_YN AS fileAtchYn ,FILE_EXT_FLTER AS fileExtFlter ,FILE_ATCH_CO AS fileAtchCo ,VIEWER_YN AS viewerYn ,PAGE_LIST_CO AS pageListCo ,PRHIBT_WRD AS prhibtWrd ,USE_YN AS useYn ,REG_ID AS regId ,DATE_FORMAT(REG_DT, '%Y-%m-%d %H:%i:%s') AS regDt ,UPD_ID AS updId ,DATE_FORMAT(UPD_DT, '%Y-%m-%d %H:%i:%s') AS updDt ,EDITR_YN AS editrYn ,FILE_LMTT_SIZE AS fileLmttSize ,SITE_CODE AS siteCode ,INSERT_YN AS insertYn ,UPDATE_YN AS updateYn ,DELETE_YN AS deleteYn FROM TB_BOARD_MST WHERE BBS_SEQ = #{bbsSeq}

/* AdminBbsMapper.selectBbsDtlFieldList */ SELECT A.COLUMN_NM AS columnNm ,A.COLUMN_SJ AS columnSj ,A.ESSENTIAL_YN AS essentialYn ,B.BBS_SEQ AS bbsSeq ,B.SEQ AS seq ,B.USE_YN AS useYn ,B.ESSNTL_YN AS essntlYn ,B.DETAIL_YN AS detailYn ,B.LIST_YN AS listYn ,B.FIELD_SIZE AS fieldSize ,B.SEARCH_YN AS searchYn ,B.LIST_ORDR AS listOrdr FROM TB_BOARD_FIELD_LIST A LEFT JOIN TB_BOARD_MST_FIELD B ON A.COLUMN_NM = B.COLUMN_NM AND A.COLUMN_SJ = B.COLUMN_SJ AND B.BBS_SEQ = #{bbsSeq} ORDER BY BFL_SEQ
/* AdminBbsMapper.selectBbsFieldList */ SELECT COLUMN_NM AS columnNm ,COLUMN_SJ AS columnSj ,ESSENTIAL_YN AS essentialYn FROM TB_BOARD_FIELD_LIST ORDER BY BFL_SEQ
/* AdminBbsMapper.selectBbsFieldSeq */ SELECT IFNULL(MAX(SEQ), 0) + 1 FROM TB_BOARD_MST_FIELD WHERE BBS_SEQ = #{bbsSeq}

/* AdminBbsMapper.selectBbsTotalCount */ SELECT COUNT(1) FROM TB_BOARD A LEFT JOIN TB_MENU B ON A.BBS_SEQ = B.BBS_SEQ AND B.MENU_ID = #{menuId} AND B.MENU_PID = #{menuPid} AND B.SITE_CODE = 'admin' WHERE A.DEL_YN = 'N'
AND A.NTT_SJ LIKE CONCAT('%', #{nttSj}, '%')

/* AdminBbsMapper.selectBoardMst */ SELECT FILE_ATCH_YN AS fileAtchYn ,FILE_EXT_FLTER AS fileExtFlter ,FILE_ATCH_CO AS fileAtchCo ,VIEWER_YN AS viewerYn ,PAGE_LIST_CO AS pageListCo ,PRHIBT_WRD AS prhibtWrd ,EDITR_YN AS editrYn ,FILE_LMTT_SIZE AS fileLmttSize ,INSERT_YN AS insertYn ,UPDATE_YN AS updateYn ,DELETE_YN AS deleteYn FROM TB_BOARD_MST WHERE BBS_SEQ = #{bbsSeq}

/* AdminBbsMapper.selectAdminBoardFieldList */ SELECT COLUMN_NM AS columnNm ,COLUMN_SJ AS columnSj ,USE_YN AS useYn ,ESSNTL_YN AS essntlYn ,DETAIL_YN AS detailYn ,LIST_YN AS listYn ,FIELD_SIZE AS fieldSize ,SEARCH_YN AS searchYn ,LIST_ORDR AS listOrdr FROM TB_BOARD_MST_FIELD WHERE BBS_SEQ = #{bbsSeq} ORDER BY LIST_ORDR, SEQ

/* AdminBbsMapper.selectBoardDtl */ SELECT NTT_SEQ AS nttSeq ,BBS_SEQ AS bbsSeq ,SITE_CODE AS siteCode ,NTT_SJ AS nttSj ,NTT_CN AS nttCn ,NTT_RDCNT AS nttRdcnt ,ATCHFILENO AS atchfileno ,USE_YN AS useYn ,REG_ID AS regId ,DATE_FORMAT(REG_DT, '%Y-%m-%d %H:%i:%s') AS regDt ,UPD_ID AS updId ,DATE_FORMAT(UPD_DT, '%Y-%m-%d %H:%i:%s') AS updDt ,SECRET_YN AS secretYn FROM TB_BOARD WHERE NTT_SEQ = #{nttSeq} AND BBS_SEQ = #{bbsSeq}
/* AdminBbsMapper.selectBoardSeq */ SELECT IFNULL(MAX(NTT_SEQ), 0) + 1 FROM TB_BOARD WHERE BBS_SEQ = #{bbsSeq}
